requirement_topic.en: BTK Type Approval — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment (Law No. 5809)
requirement_topic.zh: BTK型式批准 — 无线电及电信终端设备（第5809号法律）
requirement_topic.zht: BTK型式批准 — 無線電及電信終端設備（第5809號法律）

summary.en: All radio and electronic communications terminal equipment placed on the Turkish market must obtain BTK (Bilgi Teknolojileri ve İletişim Kurumu) type approval under Electronic Communications Law No. 5809 and the associated Equipment Regulation (Elektronik Haberleşme Cihaz ve Sistemlerine İlişkin Yönetmelik). A BTK type approval certificate — including an assigned BTK certificate number displayed on the product label in Turkish — is mandatory before import, sale, or distribution. CE marking for EMC and electrical safety is accepted under Turkey-EU Customs Union harmonisation, but CE alone does NOT satisfy the BTK type approval requirement for intentional radiators or telecom terminal equipment. Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11), Bluetooth, and cellular devices all require BTK type approval. IMEI registration with BTK is additionally required for all cellular (GSM/UMTS/LTE/5G NR) devices before they may be activated on Turkish networks. Turkish-language labelling showing the BTK certificate number is required on the product and packaging.
summary.zh: 所有投放土耳其市场的无线电及电子通信终端设备，须依据第5809号《电子通信法》及相关设备法规（Elektronik Haberleşme Cihaz ve Sistemlerine İlişkin Yönetmelik）取得BTK（信息技术和通信管理局）型式批准。进口、销售或分发前必须持有BTK型式批准证书，产品标签须以土耳其语显示BTK证书编号。在土耳其-欧盟关税同盟协调框架下，电磁兼容和电气安全方面的CE标志可被接受，但CE标志单独不能满足有意辐射体或电信终端设备的BTK型式批准要求。Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11）、蓝牙及蜂窝设备均须取得BTK型式批准。所有蜂窝设备（GSM/UMTS/LTE/5G NR）还须在土耳其网络激活前向BTK进行IMEI注册。产品及包装上须有显示BTK证书编号的土耳其语标注。
summary.zht: 所有投放土耳其市場的無線電及電子通訊終端設備，須依據第5809號《電子通訊法》及相關設備法規（Elektronik Haberleşme Cihaz ve Sistemlerine İlişkin Yönetmelik）取得BTK（資訊技術和通訊管理局）型式批准。進口、銷售或分發前必須持有BTK型式批准證書，產品標籤須以土耳其語顯示BTK證書編號。在土耳其-歐盟關稅同盟協調框架下，電磁相容和電氣安全方面的CE標誌可被接受，但CE標誌單獨不能滿足有意輻射體或電信終端設備的BTK型式批准要求。Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11）、藍牙及蜂窩設備均須取得BTK型式批准。所有蜂窩設備（GSM/UMTS/LTE/5G NR）還須在土耳其網路激活前向BTK進行IMEI註冊。產品及包裝上須有顯示BTK證書編號的土耳其語標注。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Law No. 5809 (Elektronik Haberleşme Kanunu)
Elektronik Haberleşme Cihaz ve Sistemlerine İlişkin Yönetmelik (Equipment Regulation)
BTK Type Approval Procedures (BTK Cihaz Onayları)

summary.en: In China, radio type approval for intentional radiators is granted by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission) under the Radio Regulations (Order No. 14, 2016). Network access licenses (NAL) issued by MIIT are required for telecom terminal equipment connecting to public networks. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) applies to certain RF products in scope under the CCC catalogue. These Chinese approvals are country-specific and are not recognised by BTK; they do not substitute for Turkish BTK type approval.
summary.zh: 在中国，有意辐射体的无线电型式核准由MIIT/SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）依据《无线电管理条例》（第14号令，2016年）颁发。MIIT颁发的电信设备进网许可证适用于接入公共网络的电信终端设备。CCC（中国强制认证）适用于CCC目录范围内的部分射频产品。上述中国批准证书具有国家特定性，不被BTK认可，不能替代土耳其BTK型式批准。
summary.zht: 在中國，有意輻射體的無線電型式核准由MIIT/SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）依據《無線電管理條例》（第14號令，2016年）頒發。MIIT頒發的電信設備進網許可證適用於接入公共網路的電信終端設備。CCC（中國強制認證）適用於CCC目錄範圍內的部分射頻產品。上述中國批准證書具有國家特定性，不被BTK認可，不能替代土耳其BTK型式批准。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC Radio Type Approval — Radio Regulations (MIIT Order No. 14, 2016)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Telecom Terminal Equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — RF products in catalogue scope

gap.en: Full gap. SRRC and MIIT NAL approvals are not recognised by BTK. A separate BTK type approval certificate must be obtained through a BTK-accredited testing laboratory before import or sale in Turkey. CE marking covers EMC/safety only and does not satisfy radio type approval. IMEI registration is a Turkey-specific obligation for cellular devices with no direct China parallel.
gap.zh: 完全差距。SRRC及MIIT进网许可不被BTK认可。须在进口或土耳其销售前通过BTK认可检测实验室取得单独的BTK型式批准证书。CE标志仅覆盖电磁兼容/安全，不满足无线电型式批准要求。IMEI注册是蜂窝设备的土耳其特有义务，中国无直接对应要求。
gap.zht: 完全差距。SRRC及MIIT進網許可不被BTK認可。須在進口或土耳其銷售前通過BTK認可檢測實驗室取得單獨的BTK型式批准證書。CE標誌僅覆蓋電磁相容/安全，不滿足無線電型式批准要求。IMEI註冊是蜂窩設備的土耳其特有義務，中國無直接對應要求。

source.publisher: BTK — Bilgi Teknolojileri ve İletişim Kurumu

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC and MIIT NAL approvals do not satisfy the Turkish BTK type approval requirement. Separate BTK certification via a BTK-accredited laboratory is mandatory before import or sale in Turkey. IMEI registration with BTK is an additional mandatory step for all cellular devices.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC及MIIT进网许可不满足土耳其BTK型式批准要求。须在进口或土耳其销售前通过BTK认可实验室取得单独的BTK型式批准证书。蜂窝设备还须向BTK进行IMEI注册，这是额外的强制步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC及MIIT進網許可不滿足土耳其BTK型式批准要求。須在進口或土耳其銷售前通過BTK認可實驗室取得單獨的BTK型式批准證書。蜂窩設備還須向BTK進行IMEI註冊，這是額外的強制步驟。
